tools.name: get_country_overview
tools.description: Get all key statistics and AI narrative for a country. Returns GDP, population, life expectancy, inflation, unemployment, and more.

tools.name: get_indicator_ranking
tools.description: Rank countries by an indicator available to the caller's tier. Supports top N and bottom N queries.

tools.name: get_historical_data
tools.description: Get historical time series (20+ years) for a country and indicator pair.

tools.name: search_indicators
tools.description: Search for indicators by keyword. Use when you need to find the right indicator ID.

tools.name: get_available_indicators
tools.description: List all available indicators grouped by category.

tools.name: get_country_list
tools.description: List all 218 countries with metadata (region, income level, capital).

tools.name: get_series_data
tools.description: High-frequency (daily/weekly/monthly) series: US Treasury yield curve (UST.YC.3M … UST.YC.30Y), SOFR/EFFR/OBFR, CORRA and GoC yields, central bank policy rates for ~38 economies (BIS.CBPOL.M/D), monthly CPI inflation for ~190 countries (IMF.CPI.YOY.M, IMF.CPI.FOOD.YOY.M), monthly 10-year government

tools.name: list_series
tools.description: List the high-frequency series catalog (rates, yields, monthly labour and energy) with frequency, unit, source, and licence for each.

tools.name: compare_sources
tools.description: Cross-source reconciliation: for one concept (e.g. GDP), return the IMF, World Bank, and UN values side by side per country, with the year each source reports. Sources legitimately disagree — different vintages, exchange-rate conventions, and revision cycles; this tool makes the disagreement visible

tools.name: get_release_calendar
tools.description: Upcoming central-bank rate decisions, official data releases (GDP, trade), and IMF/World Bank meeting dates, collected from each institution's own published schedule (ECB, Bank of Canada, US BEA). Every entry carries its primary source URL.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "get_series_data" is 671 chars, far longer than this server's median (99). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: High-frequency (daily/weekly/monthly) series: US Treasury yield curve (UST.YC.3M … UST.YC.30Y), SOFR/EFFR/OBFR, CORRA and GoC yields, central bank policy rates …
